name: Fairway Finder
challenge: Hit the fairway off the tee on a par 4 or 5.
rulesText: Success if tee shot finishes in fairway on a par 4 or 5.

name: Green Light
challenge: Reach the green in regulation.
rulesText: Success if player reaches GIR for the hole par.

name: Clean Start
challenge: No penalty strokes on the hole.
rulesText: Success if player records zero penalty strokes on the hole.

name: Two-Putt Pro
challenge: Take no more than two putts once on the green.
rulesText: Success if player needs at most two putts after first reaching green.

name: Bogey Saver
challenge: Make bogey or better.
rulesText: Success if score is bogey, par, birdie, or better.

name: Solid Contact
challenge: Advance every full swing at least 70% of intended distance with no whiffs or duffs.
rulesText: Success if all full swings are solid advances and no full swing is a whiff/duff.

name: No Sand Trouble
challenge: Avoid all bunkers on the hole.
rulesText: Success if player never enters a bunker on this hole.

name: Recovery Artist
challenge: Miss the fairway but still make bogey or better.
rulesText: Success if player misses fairway off tee and still scores bogey or better.

name: Safe Layup
challenge: On a par 5, do not go for the green in two, then make bogey or better.
rulesText: Success if player intentionally lays up on a reachable par 5 and still scores bogey or better.

name: First-Putt Friend
challenge: Your first putt finishes within 3 feet of the hole.
rulesText: Success if first putt leaves 3 feet or less.

name: Straight Ball
challenge: No shot on the hole ends out of bounds or in a hazard.
rulesText: Success if all strokes stay in play and avoid OB/hazard areas.

name: Par 3 Survivor
challenge: On a par 3, make bogey or better.
rulesText: Success if score is bogey or better on a par 3.

name: Good Miss
challenge: Miss the green but get up-and-down for bogey or better.
rulesText: Success if player misses green and still finishes bogey or better.

name: Center Face-ish
challenge: No topped or chunked full swings on the hole.
rulesText: Success if no full swing is topped or chunked.

name: Keep It Moving
challenge: Play the hole without taking a provisional or re-tee.
rulesText: Success if player never hits a provisional and never re-tees.

name: Stress-Free Finish
challenge: Hole out with one putt from inside 6 feet.
rulesText: Success if final putt is holed from inside 6 feet in one attempt.

name: No Big Number
challenge: Score double bogey or better.
rulesText: Success if score is double bogey or better.

name: Respectable Hole
challenge: Hit either the fairway or green, and make bogey or better.
rulesText: Success if player hits fairway or green at least once in regulation path and scores bogey or better.

name: Fair Miss
challenge: Miss the fairway, but stay in bounds and avoid hazards.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Miss the fairway, but stay in bounds and avoid hazards. Reward: +1.

name: Safe Green
challenge: Miss the green, but leave yourself a chip or putt from a makeable position.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Miss the green, but leave yourself a chip or putt from a makeable position. Reward: +1.

name: Advance and Survive
challenge: No full shot travels backward or sideways more than forward.
rulesText: Manual mission check. No full shot travels backward or sideways more than forward. Reward: +1.

name: No Three Off the Tee
challenge: Do not hit out of bounds off the tee.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Do not hit out of bounds off the tee. Reward: +1.

name: Lag Master
challenge: Your longest putt of the hole finishes within 4 feet.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Your longest putt of the hole finishes within 4 feet. Reward: +1.

name: Good Number
challenge: Make net par relative to your normal level for the hole.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Make net par relative to your normal level for the hole. Reward: +1.

name: Fairway or Fringe
challenge: Finish in either the fairway, fringe, or green with your approach sequence.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Finish in either the fairway, fringe, or green with your approach sequence. Reward: +1.

name: Trouble Avoided
challenge: Do not hit water, bunker, trees, or OB on the hole.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Do not hit water, bunker, trees, or OB on the hole. Reward: +1.

name: Tap-In Finish
challenge: Make your final putt from 3 feet or less.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Make your final putt from 3 feet or less. Reward: +1.

name: Calm Hole
challenge: No penalty strokes and no putt longer than three attempts.
rulesText: Manual mission check. No penalty strokes and no putt longer than three attempts. Reward: +1.

name: Green-Side Safety
challenge: If you miss the green, miss it green-side rather than short-sided or hazard-side.
rulesText: Manual mission check. If you miss the green, miss it green-side rather than short-sided or hazard-side. Reward: +1.

name: Tee Box Competent
challenge: Hit your tee shot in play and advance it at least a solid distance.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Hit your tee shot in play and advance it at least a solid distance. Reward: +1.

name: Fairway First
challenge: On a par 4 or 5, hit your tee shot in play and on the correct side of the hole.
rulesText: Manual mission check. On a par 4 or 5, hit your tee shot in play and on the correct side of the hole. Reward: +1.

name: Middle of the Green
challenge: On approach, play safely to the center of the green and hit any putting surface.
rulesText: Manual mission check. On approach, play safely to the center of the green and hit any putting surface. Reward: +1.

name: No Reload
challenge: Do not hit any shot that requires an immediate re-hit.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Do not hit any shot that requires an immediate re-hit. Reward: +1.

name: Green-Side Exit
challenge: If you miss the green, leave your ball in a playable green-side position.
rulesText: Manual mission check. If you miss the green, leave your ball in a playable green-side position. Reward: +1.

name: One Good Putt
challenge: Make at least one confident, cleanly struck putt on the hole, regardless of length.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Make at least one confident, cleanly struck putt on the hole, regardless of length. Reward: +1.

name: No Cheap Mistakes
challenge: No penalty strokes, no whiffs, and no missed tap-ins.
rulesText: Manual mission check. No penalty strokes, no whiffs, and no missed tap-ins. Reward: +1.

name: Advance the Ball
challenge: Every full swing must clearly improve your position.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Every full swing must clearly improve your position. Reward: +1.

name: Soft Landing
challenge: Finish any approach or chip on the green or fringe.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Finish any approach or chip on the green or fringe. Reward: +1.

name: Keep the Card Clean
challenge: Avoid triple bogey or worse.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Avoid triple bogey or worse. Reward: +1.

name: Routine Hole
challenge: Play the hole without a rules debate, ball search longer than a minute, or a second-guess meltdown.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Play the hole without a rules debate, ball search longer than a minute, or a second-guess meltdown. Reward: +1.

name: Bombs Away
challenge: Drive 260+ yards in play.
rulesText: Success if player hits an in-play drive of at least 260 yards.

name: Dagger Putt
challenge: Make a putt of 15 feet or longer.
rulesText: Success if player holes a putt from 15+ feet.

name: Hero Recovery
challenge: After a recovery shot from trouble, still make bogey or better.
rulesText: Success if player executes recovery from trouble and still scores bogey or better.

name: Go For It
challenge: On a par 5, attempt to reach in two and finish double bogey or better.
rulesText: Success if player goes for green in two and still posts double bogey or better.

name: Birdie Hunt
challenge: Make birdie.
rulesText: Success if player scores birdie or better.

name: Sand Wizard
challenge: Hole out from bunker or finish bunker shot inside 6 feet and make the putt.
rulesText: Success if player holes bunker shot or hits to 6 feet and converts the putt.

name: Flag Attack
challenge: Finish any approach inside 12 feet.
rulesText: Success if an approach (or par-3 tee shot) finishes within 12 feet.

name: Long Drive King
challenge: Have the longest drive in the group on the hole and keep it in play.
rulesText: Success if player has longest in-play drive in the group.

name: No Fear
challenge: Carry water or a forced hazard and still make bogey or better.
rulesText: Success if player chooses forced carry line and still scores bogey or better.

name: Scramble God
challenge: Miss fairway and green, then still save bogey or better.
rulesText: Success if player misses fairway and green then still records bogey or better.

name: Putt for Glory
challenge: Make your first putt from outside 20 feet.
rulesText: Success if first putt starts outside 20 feet and is holed.

name: Tight Window
challenge: Play through a narrow gap or intentional shape and finish without penalty.
rulesText: Success if player executes tight-window shot and takes no penalty.

name: Must-Make Finish
challenge: Hole out from 8+ feet for par or better.
rulesText: Success if player holes 8+ foot putt to secure par or better.

name: Perfect Par 3
challenge: Hit green on a par 3 and make par or better with no 3-putt.
rulesText: Success if par-3 green is hit and player records par or better without 3-putt.

name: Three Great Shots
challenge: Hit three consecutive quality shots on the hole.
rulesText: Success if player logs three consecutive quality shots: drive, approach/layup, chip/putt.

name: Pressure Player
challenge: After another player completes a mission, complete yours too.
rulesText: Success if another player completes mission first and this player also completes mission.

name: Risk It for the Biscuit
challenge: Use one extra-aggressive club choice and still make bogey or better.
rulesText: Success if player commits to aggressive club decision and scores bogey or better.

name: Clean Bird
challenge: Make birdie with no bunker, no hazard, no penalty, and no lip-out misses.
rulesText: Success if player makes birdie while avoiding bunkers, hazards, penalties, and lip-out misses.

name: Attack the Flag
challenge: Hit an approach inside 8 feet.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Hit an approach inside 8 feet. Reward: +3.

name: Snake Eyes
challenge: Make a putt of 20+ feet.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Make a putt of 20+ feet. Reward: +3.

name: Eagle Look
challenge: Create an eagle putt on a par 5.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Create an eagle putt on a par 5. Reward: +3.

name: Driver Offense
challenge: Use driver on a risky tee shot and still hit it in play.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Use driver on a risky tee shot and still hit it in play. Reward: +3.

name: Hero Carry
challenge: Carry the most dangerous visible hazard on the hole and still make bogey or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Carry the most dangerous visible hazard on the hole and still make bogey or better. Reward: +3.

name: Bunker Assassin
challenge: Get out of a bunker and finish inside 4 feet.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Get out of a bunker and finish inside 4 feet. Reward: +3.

name: Thread the Needle
challenge: Call a shaped shot before hitting it, then pull it off cleanly.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Call a shaped shot before hitting it, then pull it off cleanly. Reward: +3.

name: Full Send
challenge: Be longest in the group off the tee by a clear margin and stay in play.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Be longest in the group off the tee by a clear margin and stay in play. Reward: +3.

name: Bounce-Back Birdie
challenge: After making bogey or worse on the previous hole, make birdie here.
rulesText: Manual mission check. After making bogey or worse on the previous hole, make birdie here. Reward: +3.

name: Zero Panic
challenge: Recover from a terrible lie and still make bogey or better without a penalty.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Recover from a terrible lie and still make bogey or better without a penalty. Reward: +3.

name: Kill Shot
challenge: Have the best approach shot in the group and still convert par or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Have the best approach shot in the group and still convert par or better. Reward: +3.

name: No Regrets
challenge: Take the aggressive line everyone says not to take, and succeed.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Take the aggressive line everyone says not to take, and succeed. Reward: +3.

name: Par 5 Predator
challenge: On a par 5, put yourself in eagle-range by the time you reach the green.
rulesText: Manual mission check. On a par 5, put yourself in eagle-range by the time you reach the green. Reward: +3.

name: Pure Strike Bonus
challenge: Hit the best-feeling full swing of the group and still make bogey or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Hit the best-feeling full swing of the group and still make bogey or better. Reward: +3.

name: Drain the Snake
challenge: Make a putt from 18 feet or longer for par or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Make a putt from 18 feet or longer for par or better. Reward: +3.

name: Recovery Rope
challenge: From serious trouble, hit a recovery shot that both escapes danger and advances meaningfully.
rulesText: Manual mission check. From serious trouble, hit a recovery shot that both escapes danger and advances meaningfully. Reward: +3.

name: Short-Sided Savior
challenge: Get up-and-down after leaving yourself short-sided around the green.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Get up-and-down after leaving yourself short-sided around the green. Reward: +3.

name: Carry Commander
challenge: Choose to carry the trouble instead of laying back, and pull it off.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Choose to carry the trouble instead of laying back, and pull it off. Reward: +3.

name: One-Swing Turnaround
challenge: After a poor shot, immediately hit a great one and still make bogey or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. After a poor shot, immediately hit a great one and still make bogey or better. Reward: +3.

name: Drivable Dream
challenge: On a drivable hole, take the aggressive tee shot and finish double bogey or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. On a drivable hole, take the aggressive tee shot and finish double bogey or better. Reward: +3.

name: Laser Beam
challenge: Hit a full swing that finishes on your intended starting line and stays there.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Hit a full swing that finishes on your intended starting line and stays there. Reward: +3.

name: Pin Seeker
challenge: On an approach where the safe miss is obvious, ignore it and attack the pin successfully.
rulesText: Manual mission check. On an approach where the safe miss is obvious, ignore it and attack the pin successfully. Reward: +3.

name: Stick It Close
challenge: Finish an approach shot within 20 feet of the pin.
rulesText: Success if any approach (or par-3 tee shot) finishes within 20 feet.

name: Ice Putter
challenge: Make a putt of 10 feet or longer.
rulesText: Success if player holes a putt from 10+ feet.

name: Up-and-Down
challenge: Miss the green and still save par.
rulesText: Success if player misses green in regulation and still makes par.

name: Fairway to Green
challenge: Hit fairway and green in regulation on the same hole.
rulesText: Success if player hits fairway off tee and reaches GIR.

name: One-Putt Hero
challenge: One-putt from off the green or from more than 8 feet.
rulesText: Success if player holes out in one putt from off green or from a distance greater than 8 feet.

name: Pin Hunter
challenge: On a par 3, hit the green and finish within 25 feet.
rulesText: Success if par-3 tee shot is on green and inside 25 feet.

name: Long Two-Putt
challenge: From 30+ feet, two-putt or better.
rulesText: Success if first putt starts from 30+ feet and hole is finished in two putts or fewer.

name: Par Machine
challenge: Make par after missing either the fairway or green.
rulesText: Success if player misses fairway/green at least once and still records par.

name: Fairway Sniper
challenge: Hit fairway and finish drive in the longest third of the group.
rulesText: Success if drive is in fairway and among top-third distance in group.

name: Clutch Scramble
challenge: Get up-and-down from sand for par or bogey.
rulesText: Success if player gets up-and-down from bunker for par or bogey.

name: No-Waste Hole
challenge: Make par or better with no penalty strokes and no 3-putt.
rulesText: Success if player scores par+ while avoiding penalties and 3-putts.

name: Aggressive Line
challenge: Carry a hazard or cut a corner intentionally and make bogey or better.
rulesText: Success if player chooses aggressive carry/cut line and still records bogey or better.

name: Birdie Chance
challenge: Create a birdie putt from within 15 feet. You do not have to make it.
rulesText: Success if player has a birdie putt from 15 feet or closer.

name: Pure Tee Ball
challenge: Drive 240+ yards in play.
rulesText: Success if player records an in-play drive of 240+ yards.

name: Smart Golf
challenge: Hit the correct miss side on approach and still make par or bogey.
rulesText: Success if player follows intended miss side and still scores par or bogey.

name: Bounce Back
challenge: After a bad tee shot, still make bogey or better.
rulesText: Success if tee shot is poor and player still posts bogey or better.

name: Closed Strong
challenge: Make par or better with a made putt from 6 feet or more.
rulesText: Success if player makes 6+ foot putt and finishes par or better.

name: Par 5 Pressure
challenge: On a par 5, reach the green in regulation and avoid a 3-putt.
rulesText: Success if player reaches GIR on par 5 and takes no 3-putt.

name: Dart Board
challenge: Hit any approach inside 15 feet.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Hit any approach inside 15 feet. Reward: +2.

name: Fringe Genius
challenge: Miss the green but get down in two shots or fewer from just off the surface.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Miss the green but get down in two shots or fewer from just off the surface. Reward: +2.

name: Clutch Two-Putt
challenge: Reach the green from 40+ feet away and still avoid a 3-putt.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Reach the green from 40+ feet away and still avoid a 3-putt. Reward: +2.

name: Par 4 Precision
challenge: On a par 4, hit fairway and make par or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. On a par 4, hit fairway and make par or better. Reward: +2.

name: Pin High
challenge: Finish your approach pin-high, regardless of left/right miss.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Finish your approach pin-high, regardless of left/right miss. Reward: +2.

name: Long Iron Life
challenge: Use a long iron or hybrid on approach and still hit the green or fringe.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Use a long iron or hybrid on approach and still hit the green or fringe. Reward: +2.

name: Scramble Touch
challenge: Miss the green, chip inside 6 feet, then make the putt.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Miss the green, chip inside 6 feet, then make the putt. Reward: +2.

name: Big Putt Energy
challenge: Make a putt between 8 and 15 feet.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Make a putt between 8 and 15 feet. Reward: +2.

name: Fairway Pressure
challenge: Hit the fairway after another player already completed a drive-related mission.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Hit the fairway after another player already completed a drive-related mission. Reward: +2.

name: Course Management
challenge: Take the safe play when danger is in play, then still make par or bogey.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Take the safe play when danger is in play, then still make par or bogey. Reward: +2.

name: Drive for Show
challenge: Finish with one of the two longest drives in the group and still make bogey or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Finish with one of the two longest drives in the group and still make bogey or better. Reward: +2.

name: Green Window
challenge: Hit the correct tier/section of the green as agreed by the group before the shot.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Hit the correct tier/section of the green as agreed by the group before the shot. Reward: +2.

name: Wedge Wizard
challenge: From wedge range, hit your approach inside 18 feet.
rulesText: Manual mission check. From wedge range, hit your approach inside 18 feet. Reward: +2.

name: Lag and Tap
challenge: From 25+ feet, leave your first putt inside 2 feet.
rulesText: Manual mission check. From 25+ feet, leave your first putt inside 2 feet. Reward: +2.

name: Fairway Conversion
challenge: Hit the fairway, then hit the green or fringe with your next full shot.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Hit the fairway, then hit the green or fringe with your next full shot. Reward: +2.

name: Scramble to Par
challenge: Miss the green and still make par with a chip and putt sequence.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Miss the green and still make par with a chip and putt sequence. Reward: +2.

name: Tee Shot Trust
challenge: Hit your tee ball in play and finish with one of the better two tee shots in the group.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Hit your tee ball in play and finish with one of the better two tee shots in the group. Reward: +2.

name: Controlled Aggression
challenge: Take an aggressive line on one shot and execute it without penalty or disaster.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Take an aggressive line on one shot and execute it without penalty or disaster. Reward: +2.

name: Strong Three
challenge: On a par 3, finish with par or better after hitting the green or fringe.
rulesText: Manual mission check. On a par 3, finish with par or better after hitting the green or fringe. Reward: +2.

name: Long Putt Touch
challenge: From outside 20 feet, avoid both a 3-putt and leaving the second putt outside 3 feet.
rulesText: Manual mission check. From outside 20 feet, avoid both a 3-putt and leaving the second putt outside 3 feet. Reward: +2.

name: Trouble Conversion
challenge: After finding rough, trees, or an awkward lie, still get the next shot onto a safe target.
rulesText: Manual mission check. After finding rough, trees, or an awkward lie, still get the next shot onto a safe target. Reward: +2.

name: Smart Birdie Look
challenge: Create a realistic birdie chance without taking on unnecessary danger.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Create a realistic birdie chance without taking on unnecessary danger. Reward: +2.
